summary: Recent updates to the camera and audio capture components in Firefox focus on enhancing the logging and event handling capabilities. By implementing **MOZ_LOG_FMT in system services**, developers can now better track and diagnose issues related to camera functionality, improving overall reliability for users. Additionally, integrating **EventTargetCapability throughout CamerasParent** allows for more efficient management of camera-related events, ensuring smoother and more responsive interactions when using video. These improvements collectively enhance the user experience, particularly for applications that rely heavily on real-time audio and visual input, such as video conferencing and streaming.
